title: Create Snickers
description: This is a mod that adds Snickers to Create, compatible with Farmer's Delight.
body:
Adds Snickers to Minecraft!

This is a food item that quickly restores your hunger. You can craft it using recipes from Create and Farmer's Delight.

Bonus: If you craft it using Create's mechanics, you might obtain a Special Snickers!

You are free to use this mod in any modpack without notifying the author.
